violations.text: Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/15/2026
The (floor) in the (back kitchen ) area is in poor repair. Observed an unfinished floor. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 06/15/2026

(Potatoes and chicken patty) was observed held at (119-129 ) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods placed in other hot holding unit for proper reheat. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

(Cut melons) was observed held at (55) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.PIC moved to cold hold unit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

Thermometers are lacking in the refrigeration unit(s). Cold holding equipment used for time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must have at least one thermometer that is located to allow easy viewing of the temperature display. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

Various food product was observed being stored on sink attached to dishwasher. PIC informed to cease practice and product was moved to prep area and cold hold unit. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine at the (dishwasher). New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. Establishment observed with an air break. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026
The (floor ) in the (back kitchen ) area is in poor repair. Observed unfinished floor. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 04/08/2026

Mac and cheese and mix veggies were observed held at 129- and 121-degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Foods placed in other hot holding unit for proper reheat. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
Apples, located in self-display area, were observed not protected from contamination. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025

Cold- and/or hot-holding units were observed in poor repair in the kitchen area. Equipment components such as doors, seals, hinges, fasteners, and kick plates shall be kept intact, tight, and adjusted in accordance with manufacturer's specifications. (Ambient 92 degrees F.) Unit taken out of service until repairs/replacement completed. New Violation. Correct By: 11/06/2025
The floor and wall junctures in the 3 bay sink area is missing coving. The floor and wall junctures must be coved and closed to no larger than 1/32nd of an inch. New Violation. Correct By: 11/20/2025
The floor in the kitchen is in poor repair. Unfinished area of floor observed. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/01/2025

The sink used for food preparation is lacking an air gap. A direct connection must not exist between the sewage system and a drain originating from equipment in which food is placed. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the (chlorine) sanitizing solution for the (3 bay sink ). New Violation. Correct By: 10/24/2024

The ventilation duct was observed with a hole leading to an opening outside. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair and outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/26/2024

An area of the wall in the kitchen where food prep is done and in the mop sink room is constructed of painted drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2023
Cleaned and sanitized equipment and utensils are not stored to allow for air drying.. New Violation. Correct By: 06/02/2023

An area of the wall in the kitchen where food prep is done and in the mop sink room is constructed of painted drywall. This material is not durable. Materials for wall surfaces shall be smooth, durable, easily cleanable, and non-absorbent for areas subject to moisture such as food preparation areas, walk-in refrigerators, ware-washing areas, and toilet rooms. New Violation. Correct By: 06/30/2023
